title: Mad About Opera
writer: Mario Costa, Mario Monicelli, Giovanna Soria
actors: Gino Bechi, Maria Caniglia, Tito Gobbi
plot: There has been no Catholic church in the Italian district of London since the only one was bombed during the Blitz. Guido Marchi, a journalist wishing it to be restored, decides to organize a show in which great names of the Itali...
